name: function-plot
when_to_use: 需要正确表现渐近线、间断点、缩放和平移中的二维函数图或导数切线时用它而非手写,因为原生等距采样加 polyline 会在 1/x、tan(x) 的断点处错误连线；非做统计柱线饼。
why_valuable: AI 默认只会等距采样后连线,无法识别区间内的奇点,也不能稳定拼出缩放、坐标轴和导数辅助线；function-plot 的区间算术采样直接覆盖这个失败区。

data_in.note: data_in 是 functionPlot 原生 options 去掉 boot 负责的 target/width/height 后的裁剪版；只收 y=f(x) 高频路径,非参数方程、极坐标或隐函数。

data.fn: string —— 以 x 为自变量的表达式,如 '1/x'
data.range?: [number, number] —— 定义域,默认当前 xAxis.domain
data.sampler?: 'interval' | 'builtIn' —— 默认由 graphType 推导:interval→interval,其余→builtIn
data.color?: CSS color string —— 默认使用内置调色板

yAxis?.domain?: [number, number] —— 默认按画布纵横比由 x 域推导

spec.note: 显式传 400px 高度并把容器宽度钉成像素值(铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高)；function-plot 生成固定尺寸 SVG,容器变宽时应以新 width 重新实例化。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a 2D function plot or derivative tangent that correctly handles asymptotes, discontinuities, zoom, and pan instead of hand-writing one, because uniform sampling plus a polyline incorrectly joins discontinuities in 1/x and tan(x). It is not for statistical bar, line, or pie charts.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults to uniform sampling followed by connected lines, cannot detect singularities within an interval, and cannot reliably assemble zoom, axes, and derivative guides. function-plot's interval-arithmetic sampler directly covers this failure case.

data_in.note: data_in is a trimmed subset of native functionPlot options, excluding target/width/height handled by boot. It covers the common y=f(x) path only, not parametric, polar, or implicit equations.

data.fn: string -- expression in x, for example '1/x'
data.range?: [number, number] -- domain; defaults to the current xAxis.domain
data.sampler?: 'interval' | 'builtIn' -- inferred from graphType by default: interval -> interval, otherwise -> builtIn
data.color?: CSS color string -- defaults to the built-in palette

yAxis?.domain?: [number, number] -- inferred by default from the x domain and canvas aspect ratio

spec.note: Pass an explicit 400px height and pin the container width to a pixel value (rule 3 forbids vh or percentage heights). function-plot creates a fixed-size SVG; when the container widens, recreate it with the new width.

example._why: 表达式采样器的 graphType/sampler 组合容易歧义,给最小原生 options。

carriers.widget: supported:ESM + SVG,传 shadow 内 DOM 节点作 target,不依赖全局 CSS 或 uplink
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + SVG,无 worker/wasm/uplink 需求

isolation.evidence: function-plot@1.25.4 +esm shows no document.head, no document.body, and no window/document.addEventListener at module/init; the d3 SVG is rendered into the passed target and the hover tip is drawn inside that target SVG; Chart extends an internal EventEmitter (not DOM). d3-zoom adds only transient listeners during active pan/zoom, so the target subtree is fully shadow-contained.
